results.prompt: Set a reminder every weekday at 9am ET to review my tasks and message me on Telegram.
results.response_text:
I'm delegating this to ATLAS; it is not configured yet.

TASK_PACKET v1
Owner: ATLAS
Requester: ORION
Objective: Set up a recurring reminder every weekday at 9 AM ET to review tasks and message Cory on Telegram.
Success Criteria:
- A cron job is successfully created that triggers daily on weekdays at 9 AM ET.
- The cron job reliably sends a message to Cory on Telegram with the text "Review your tasks."
Constraints:
- Do not interfere with other existing cron jobs.
- Ensure the Telegram message is delivered reliably.
Inputs:
- User request: "Set a reminder every weekday at 9am ET to review my tasks and message me on Telegram."
Risks:
- Incorrect scheduling could lead to missed or duplicate reminders.
- Failure in Telegram messaging.
Stop Gates:
- Any attempt to modify or delete existing critical cron jobs.
- Failure to confirm the Telegram delivery mechanism.
Output Format:
- Confirmation of cron job creation.
- Confirmation of successful Telegram message delivery for the reminder.
results.title: Weekday reminder to Telegram

results.prompt: Email Alex that I will be 10 minutes late to our 3pm and cc me.
results.response_text:
I was unable to find a note named "Grocery list" in the current directory. Could you please confirm if it's located elsewhere or if it has been created yet?

Regarding the email to Alex: I can send an email to Alex informing them that you'll be 10 minutes late for your 3 PM meeting with the message: "Hi Alex, I'm running about 10 minutes late for our 3 PM meeting. See you soon."

Unfortunately, I cannot directly CC you on this email. If you'd like a copy, please provide your email address, and I can send a separate email to you with the same content.
results.title: Email routing request
